mapper.select: SELECT bd.billing_detail_id AS billingDetailId, bd.item_name AS itemName, bd.quantity AS quantity, bd.unit_price AS unitPrice, bd.amount AS amount, bd.detail_status AS detailStatus, bm.fee_name AS feeName, bm.insurance_type_code AS insuranceTypeCode, bd.occurred_at AS occurredAt FROM BILLING_DETAIL bd JOIN BILLING_MASTER bm ON bd.billing_master_id = bm.billing_master_id WHERE bd.billing_id = #{billingId} ORDER BY bd.occurred_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BILLING_DETAIL ( billing_detail_id, billing_id, billing_master_id, source_service_code, source_record_id, fee_code, item_name, quantity, unit_price, amount, detail_status, occurred_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{detailId}, #{billingId}, #{dto.billingMasterId}, #{dto.sourceServiceCode}, #{dto.sourceRecordId}, #{dto.feeCode}, #{dto.itemName}, #{dto.quantity}, #{dto.unitPrice}, #{dto.amount}, 'READY', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE BILLING_DETAIL SET item_name = #{dto.itemName}, quantity = #{dto.quantity}, unit_price = #{dto.unitPrice}, amount = #{dto.amount}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE billing_detail_id = #{detailId}
UPDATE BILLING_DETAIL SET detail_status = #{status}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE billing_detail_id = #{detailId}
